_comment: #69 promotion lifecycle registry. One entry per gate-passed candidate or pre-registered challenger. Standing rule (PRD #69, adopted 2026-07-11): NOTHING is promoted without a demotion rule written in its entry BEFORE promotion — a promoted signal that stops working leaves by rule, not by debate. homily_promotions.py executes the forward checks against the #13 ledger; homily_validate.py asserts every entry names its gate artifact and demotion rule. Edit this file only by appending entries or filling a decision — never rewrite a frozen criterion after data starts accruing.

entries.what: concentrate the monthly stock-half into the top-3 ⭐ candidates by 12m relative strength (PRD §5j)
entries.gate_artifact: homily_selection_backtest.py (rule pre-registered in docstring) + BACKTEST_RESULTS.md §4 + PRD §5j

forward_check.criterion: mean forward-21-ledger-row raw-close return of ⭐ rows with rank<=3 must EXCEED the mean of ⭐ rows with rank>3 over the window; fewer than min_measured_rows on either side = INSUFFICIENT, decision deferred, no promotion

entries.if_promoted: digest orders ⭐ rows by RS12 with top-3 marked; PLAYBOOK §3.4 becomes split-across-top-3; homily_buyday allocates top-3 (MAX_STARS/ordering); one session, one commit
entries.demotion_rule: if promoted: demote back to equal-split max-5 when top-3 ⭐ rows underperform other-⭐ rows on the same mean forward-21-row metric over any rolling 6-month ledger window ending after promotion; checked by homily_promotions.py at each month-start; demotion is mandatory on a failed check, not a discussion

entries.what: select between ⭐ candidates by whale-accumulation intensity instead of RS12 (PRD §5k / #80, MARA-vs-WULF pattern)
entries.gate_artifact: NOT YET RUN — pre-registered 2026-07-11 (PRD §8.3 #80): enters the #24 three-way harness at the 2026-10-01 read (whale-top3 vs rs12-top3 vs equal-all) and must tie-or-beat rs12-top3 on all three honest windows incl. the hype-2021 control, else CLOSED

forward_check.criterion: informational until the backtest gate runs: mean forward-21-row return of ⭐ rows with whale_rank<=3 vs rank>3 over the window (whale_rank column live from 2026-07-13)

entries.if_promoted: selection/ordering by whale_rank instead of rs12_rank, same surfaces as rs12-top3
entries.demotion_rule: same rolling-6-month underperformance rule as rs12-top3, frozen here before any gate runs
